# generate_a_strategy_fixtures.py

<!-- Generated by scripts/docs/generate_api_docs.py. Do not edit manually. -->

## Purpose

Generate canonical A-strategy fixtures from HybridStrategySpec.

## CLI usage

```bash
python scripts/generate/generate_a_strategy_fixtures.py --help
```

## CLI options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Choices | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| --families |  | all | False | majority pyramid horizontal vertical all |  |
| --include-all-legal | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --k-box-values | int | list(DEFAULT_K_BOX_VALUES) | False |  |  |
| --legacy-defaults | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --max-comm-cells | int | 16000000 | False |  |  |
| --max-n2-for-dense-fixtures | int | 8 | False |  |  |
| --n2-values | int | list(DEFAULT_N2_VALUES) | False |  |  |
| --output-dir | Path | DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR | False |  |  |
| --overwrite | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --p-rule-values | float | list(DEFAULT_P_RULE_VALUES) | False |  |  |
